name: selective-download-ui-production-implementation
purpose: Implement a production-ready local dashboard that lets the user choose exactly which discovered Google Classroom content should be downloaded and exported.

context.security_model: Local-first. Tokens, metadata, downloaded content, and selection manifests must remain on the user's machine.

objective.summary: Add a selective archive workflow with plan generation, local UI review, persisted selections, filtered downloads, and migration-ready exports.
objective.primary_user_story: As a user, I want the engine to discover Classroom content first, show me a local UI with courses/topics/materials/files, let me choose what to archive, and download only the selected content.
success_criteria: One command discovers content and opens a local selection UI.
The UI shows every discovered course, topic, material, and attachment in a searchable tree/table.
The user can select or deselect at course, topic, material, attachment, MIME type, provider, and date-range levels.
Selections persist locally and can be resumed after interruption.
The download phase only downloads selected attachments.
The final JSON and SQLite exports include selected, skipped, failed, and complete statuses.
CI, security, privacy, and compliance checks pass before merge or release.

phases.description: Crawl metadata only and enrich Drive metadata without downloading file bodies.
Serve a local-only UI from 127.0.0.1 where the user reviews and edits selections.
Read the selection manifest and download only selected attachments.
Export selected archive metadata and skipped item metadata.

local_services.network_policy: Never bind to 0.0.0.0 by default. Never send archive data to a hosted service.

suggested_ui_stack.minimum: Static HTML/CSS/vanilla JS served by the existing Node API
suggested_ui_stack.production_option: Vite + React after the API contract stabilizes
suggested_ui_stack.icons: Use lucide icons if a React UI is introduced

sqlite_changes: Add download_plan table for generated plan metadata.
Add download_selection table for persisted selection state.
Add selected INTEGER DEFAULT 1, skipped_reason TEXT, planned_bytes INTEGER to attachments or a selection join table.

endpoints.purpose: Trigger metadata-only crawl and regenerate the plan.
Return progress, failures, skipped items, and resumable state.
Regenerate SQLite and master_index JSON from current state.

primary_views: Attachment table with search, filters, sorting, and bulk select
Summary panel with selected courses/materials/files and estimated size
Download progress view with retry/skip/failure details
Settings view for concurrency, retry count, output path, and export formats

required_flags.behavior: Crawl metadata, enrich Drive metadata, write plan, do not download.
Run plan generation if needed, then start local UI.
Download only selected items from the manifest.

download_manager: Accept a predicate or selection set.
Skip unselected attachments with status skipped and skipped_reason user_unselected.
Preserve dedupe and resume behavior for selected items.
Keep reference files for selected external, YouTube, and Form items.
exporter: Include selected, skipped, failed, and complete status in master_index.json.
Do not hide skipped items unless the user passes an explicit export filter.

release_policy: vX.Y.Z-rc.N tags create GitHub prereleases for staging validation.
vX.Y.Z tags create production GitHub releases.
No release if sanitizer, compliance, tests, or audit fail.

privacy: Local API binds to 127.0.0.1 by default.
google_api: Use least-privilege read-only OAuth scopes where possible.
OAuth consent and test-user setup must be documented.
Respect user account permissions and Drive access constraints.

acceptance_tests: Given no token, engine opens OAuth in system browser and does not use Playwright login by default.
Given a token, --plan-only writes download_plan.json without downloading files.
Given a plan, the UI renders courses/topics/materials/attachments.
Given a partial selection, --download-selected downloads only selected attachments.
Given an interrupted run, rerunning resumes selected pending downloads.
Given external links and YouTube items selected, reference JSON files are written.
Given unselected items, master_index.json includes skipped_reason user_unselected.
Given CI, all required checks pass on Node 20 and 22.
implementation_order: Add local API endpoints for plan, selection, and progress.
Build local UI against mocked plan JSON.
Wire UI to live local API.
Add tests for plan generation, selection filtering, and API endpoints.
non_goals: Uploading user Classroom data to any external service
